description: GuardianD — Production-grade EC2 instance observability. Covers CPU, Memory, Disk I/O, Network, PSI pressure, EC2 metadata, application health, and intelligence layer (anomaly detection, forecasting).

panels.title: CPU PSI
panels.description: Linux PSI (Pressure Stall Information) — % of time tasks are stalling. CPU / Memory / I/O.

panels.title: Sys Load
panels.description: Load average normalized by CPU count. >2 = warn, >4 = critical.

panels.title: CPU Co...
panels.description: Logical CPU count

panels.title: RootFS ...
panels.description: Root filesystem total size

panels.title: CPU Steal
panels.description: EC2 CPU stolen by hypervisor. >5% = warn, >15% = noisy neighbor.

panels.title: CPU Basic
panels.description: CPU time breakdown — stacked area. Steal = EC2 hypervisor tax.

panels.title: Memory Basic
panels.description: Memory breakdown. Total line is a reference. Swap on right axis.

panels.title: Network Traffic Basic
panels.description: Receive (positive) vs Transmit (negative mirrored) per interface.

panels.title: Disk Space Used Basic
panels.description: Disk usage % per mountpoint over time.

panels.title: CPU iowait %
panels.description: Time CPU spent waiting for I/O. >40% = disk bottleneck.

panels.title: Swap Activity (In/Out pages/sec)
panels.description: Swap-in (positive) and swap-out (negative). High swap-out = memory pressure.

panels.title: Dirty Pages
panels.description: Dirty bytes = modified pages not yet written to disk. Buildup precedes I/O stalls.

panels.title: File Descriptors Used %
panels.description: System-wide FD usage. >80% = risk. >95% = services will crash.

panels.title: Memory PSI — Some (tasks stalling)
panels.description: % of time at least some tasks stalled waiting for memory. avg10/avg60/avg300.

panels.title: Memory PSI — FULL (ALL tasks stalling)
panels.description: CRITICAL: % of time ALL tasks were stalled waiting for memory. Any value > 0 is serious.

panels.title: Disk Read / Write Throughput
panels.description: Read positive, write negative (mirrored). Per disk device.

panels.title: Disk Await / Latency (ms)  ← KEY DIAGNOSTIC PANEL
panels.description: Average I/O latency per disk. SSD warn=10ms, crit=50ms. HDD warn=100ms, crit=500ms. EBS warn=20ms, crit=100ms.

panels.title: Disk Utilization %
panels.description: % of time the disk was busy. >80% = saturation.

panels.title: Disk Latency p95 (histogram_quantile)
panels.description: 95th percentile I/O latency from histogram. More accurate than simple await average.

panels.title: TCP Connections by State
panels.description: CLOSE_WAIT high = connection leak. SYN_RECV high = SYN flood.

panels.title: DNS Latency (ms)
panels.description: Time to resolve VPC DNS resolver (169.254.169.253). High = DNS issue.

panels.title: Socket Stats (TCP alloc / UDP in use)
CPU Steal % vs CPU Usage % (24h Trend)
panels.description: Steal rising while CPU usage is low = noisy neighbor on EC2 hypervisor.

panels.title: Collector Performance (duration ms)
panels.description: How long each collector takes per cycle. Sustained >5s = may miss cycles.

panels.title: Zombie Processes
panels.description: Zombie processes over time. Sustained growth = parent not reaping children.

panels.title: Disk Forecast ETA (hours until full)
panels.description: Phase 2 intelligence: linear regression forecast. Orange < 8h, Red < 2h.

title: GuardianD — EC2 Instance Observability
